title: WHEELS OF POWER - 211info
text: ROTARY CLUB OF PORTLAND WHEELS OF POWER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric wheelchairs and scooters. Confidential Address Eligibility: -Immobilized individuals who cannot use manual wheelchairs -A need for financial assistance -Insurance does not cover the expense -Home must be wheelchair accessible with no barriers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 228-1542 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-1542 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to apply; call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application and doctor referral for electric chair required AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97005, 97006, 97007, 97008, 97015, 97027, 97030, 97034, 97035, 97201, 97202, 97203, 97204, 97205, 97206, 97207, 97208, 97209, 97210, 97211, 97212, 97213, 97214, 97215, 97216, 97217, 97218, 97219, 97220, 97221, 97222, 97223, 97224, 97225, 97227, 97229, 97230, 97231, 97232, 97233, 97236, 97239, 97242, 97266, and 97267 Services: Electric Scooters Wheelchairs/Wheeled Mobility Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY GRANTS FOR NONPROFITS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROTARY CLUB OF PORTLAND
